sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84879" key="polu/qridac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-θρῐδαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰκος</itype>, <sense id="n84879.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abounding in lettuces,</tr_> Diom.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2051.tlg001:p.326" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.326</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
